name: Fire Infinity
description: Fire Infinity is a Fire Drill style variant built on the Infinity platform.

special.description: Testing Fire Resistance. Always incendiary. Does not consume ammo and has a fixed magazine size of 1. Fires in a fixed pattern that ignores normal recoil. 100% elemental effect chance. Higher damage. Better accuracy while aiming down sights. Lower fire rate.
special.title: Testing Fire Resistance

notes: Uses the same 3D model as the Infinity. Appears to be an internal test version of Fire Drill, using the balance entry "GD_Anemone_Weapons.Testing_Resist_100.100_Fire" instead of "GD_Anemone_Weapons.A_Resist_100.100_Fire".
